Darius.trading_pattern: Trundle pillar zones Darius perfectly. Your Q outpaces his Q damage. Pillar him away from bleed stacks.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk into his face. Trundle pillar denies his spacing.
Darius.early_game: Dominate with pillar zones and Q damage. Darius can't bleed effectively with pillar.
Darius.mid_game: Your tankiness and pillar control win fights. His ult is deadly — avoid low HP.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through pillar utility and tankiness. Darius is strong but pillar zoning is key.
Darius.win_condition: Use pillar to zone and deny bleed stacking. Q poke when safe. Scale into teamfights.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through pillar utility and tankiness.
Darius.positioning: Use pillar to push him away. Stay close to deny his Q range. Trade Q aggressively.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence is negated if you kite. Your Q and pillar control spacing. He can't chase with pillar.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — move away before it lands. Pillar him as he approaches.
Garen.early_game: Dominate with pillar zones and Q poke. Garen can't close gap with pillar.
Garen.mid_game: Your tankiness and pillar control win fights. His tankiness scales but pillar matters.
Garen.late_game: Even — both scale as tanks. Pillar utility keeps you ahead.
Garen.win_condition: Use pillar to zone and kite. Q poke when safe. Scale into teamfights.
Garen.scaling: You slightly outscale through pillar utility.
Garen.positioning: Pillar him as he approaches. Kite and space with pillar. Trade Q aggressively.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q range is massive. Your pillar helps, but his Q damage is oppressive early.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — move sideways to dodge. Pillar him to deny damage.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox's Q outranges you. Play around pillar and avoid extended trades.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your tankiness improves. His Q still hurts. Pillar and trade carefully.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and pillar CC. He falls off compared to you.
Aatrox.win_condition: Use pillar to zone and dodge Q. Play around his cooldowns. Scale into teamfights.
Aatrox.scaling: You outscale through tankiness and pillar utility.
Aatrox.positioning: Pillar to dodge Q. Space carefully. Scale and team fight grouped.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo is fast and oppressive. Your pillar helps zone. Play around pillar and avoid combos.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash combo — pillar her before she closes. Space with pillar.
Riven.early_game: Riven's burst dominates. Use pillar to zone and avoid combos. Don't trade.
Riven.mid_game: Your tankiness improves. Her split push is strong. Group for teamfights.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight utility. Riven struggles in grouped fights.
Riven.win_condition: Use pillar defensively. Avoid her combos. Scale into teamfights.
Riven.scaling: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight utility.
Riven.positioning: Pillar defensively. Space from her combo range. Group for teamfights.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry negates your damage. Your pillar helps zone. Play around her parry.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — pillar her instead of trying to hit her. She can't parry pillar CC.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora's parry is oppressive. Use pillar to CC her instead of trading damage.
Fiora.mid_game: Your tankiness improves. Her split push is strong. Group for teamfights.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight. Fiora excels in 1v1.
Fiora.win_condition: Use pillar CC instead of trading damage. Avoid her parry. Scale into teamfights.
Fiora.scaling: You outscale through teamfights — Fiora through 1v1.
Fiora.positioning: Pillar for CC, not damage trades. Group for teamfights.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's dueling and E stun are oppressive. Your pillar helps but his damage is high.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun counter — pillar him before he engages. Space with pillar.
Jax.early_game: Jax's dueling is strong. Use pillar to zone. Don't extend into E range.
Jax.mid_game: Your tankiness improves. His dueling is still strong. Group for teamfights.
Jax.late_game: Even — both scale well. Pillar utility helps you slightly.
Jax.win_condition: Use pillar to zone and prevent his engagement. Scale into teamfights.
Jax.scaling: Even — both scale well. Pillar utility helps slightly.
Jax.positioning: Pillar defensively. Zone with pillar. Group for teamfights.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser's passive shield and Q are oppressive. Your pillar helps but his all-in is strong.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — move sideways when he casts it. Pillar him to deny the pull.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser's all-in dominates. Use pillar to zone. Don't duel.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your tankiness improves. His ult can isolate you. Avoid 1v1s.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You outscale through teamfight tankiness. He struggles without isolation.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Use pillar defensively. Avoid duels. Scale into grouped teamfights.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Pillar defensively. Avoid his E pull. Group for teamfights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has no early game. Your Q and pillar completely zone him. Dominate early.

Nasus.early_game: Dominate with pillar zones and Q poke. Nasus is helpless against pillar.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead matters. His stacking helps him. Group for fights to avoid late duels.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through teamfights and pillar utility.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with pillar zones and Q poke. Build lead. Group late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through teamfights.
